overview.subtitle: Your personal NAS system — fully self-hosted.

server.title: BaluHost Server
server.description: The core — backend (Python/FastAPI) and web frontend (React). Manages files, users, RAID, VPN, monitoring and more.

app.title: BaluApp
app.description: Native Android app with QR pairing, auto-upload, push notifications and VPN integration.

desktop.title: BaluDesk
desktop.description: Desktop sync client (Windows/Linux) for automatic folder synchronization with the NAS.

groupDescriptions.features: File sharing, uploads and user management
groupDescriptions.deployment: Production deployment, SSL and reverse proxy
groupDescriptions.security: Security, audit logging and rate limiting
